title: Eclipse: Scamming Season
description: A modpack for the unofficial season 2 of the Eclipsed Origins smp
body:
- A Modpack for the unofficial season 2 of the Eclipsed Origins smp
This modpack contains a variety of both client and serverside mods

Gameplay mods:
- Create + some addons and compatibility mods
- Origins + some addons
- Farmers Delight
- Supplimentaries + Supplimentaries Squared + Amendments
- Friends and Foes
- Valkyrien Skies
- Immersive Aircraft
- True Ending


Worldgen:
- Ecologics [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics)
- Geophilic + Geophilic ReForged
- Tectonic
- Endercon
- Good Ending
- Luki's Grand Capital
- Antique Trading Ship
- Ships

Player Focused mods:
- Pufferfish's SkillTree + an origins addon
- StepItUp
- Curios
- The Ancient Trinkets
- Radient Gear
- Customizable Player Models

Decoration + Quality of Life:
- Bushier Flowers
- Cosmetic Armour Slots
- Double Doors
- Hat mods
- Iron Chests
- Iron Ladders
- More Mob Varients + a resource pack to work with Fresh Animations
- Simple Voice Mod
- ShulkerBox Tooltips
- Visuality
- JourneyMap
- A custom picked VanillaTweaks Resource Pack 
[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
